blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,013 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: dry, highs of 39°F, winds around 22 mph.
Sunday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
